data.content: Verified shipped linux-arm64 runtime support remains on main via .github/workflows/release-runtime-artifact.yml and src/lib/__tests__/release-runtime-artifact-workflow.test.ts. Clean worktree validation passed: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build; bun run lint completed with existing warnings only. Remote CI for commit 556a08d5 completed successfully, and git push origin HEAD:main reported Everything up-to-date after rebasing to current origin/main.
